result:
**Goal: Add a Terrain Generation & Erosion Landscape simulation mode.**

This project is a massive 60+ mode terminal simulation platform. The next natural addition is a **Terrain Generation mode** that combines multiple existing concepts (hydraulic erosion already exists) into a cohesive landscape simulator: procedurally generate terrain using diamond-square or Perlin noise, then layer on thermal erosion (rockslides on steep slopes), tectonic uplift (slow deformation over time), and vegetation growth (stabilizes soil). The visualization would render a topographic map with elevation-based coloring (ocean/beach/grass/mountain/snow bands) in the terminal. This complements the existing hydraulic erosion mode by offering a full geological timescale landscape evolution — generation, weathering, and ecological feedback — rather than just water flow on a static heightmap.
